_README: VERIFIED data points only for the ITC market map. Sources cited per pin. Do not add unsourced entries — see _TODO_DATA_SOURCES below for concrete feeds we still need to wire.
_TODO_DATA_SOURCES: TYM official dealer locator (tym.world) — page is dynamic JS, blocked by simple WebFetch. Need a Puppeteer scraper or Google Places enumeration.
Kioti dealer locator (kioti.com) — same dynamic-JS challenge
USDA Forest Service county boundaries — yields forestry-rich county overlay
USDA Census of Agriculture compact-tractor sales by county
US Fish & Wildlife state hunting-license counts — yields hunter-density layer
_NEXT_BUILD_NOTE: For dealer pins specifically, the cleanest path is a one-shot Puppeteer scraper that calls each brand's dealer-locator API directly, dumps the JSON to a static file in this directory, and rebuilds the map. Run quarterly so we stay current. Until that lands, the audience-scoped Google Places scrape (clicking a county on the ITC map → 'Dealers') gives a working substitute by surfacing local tractor dealerships dynamically.
